description: §23.2/§23.2.4 E-FOREIGN-004 — a BARE (non-value-returning) `_={ console.log(1) }=` foreign statement, not bound to `const`/`let` and not `return`ed. Only the inline value-returning form (`const x = _={ … }=` / `return _={ … }=`) is admitted in a library `fn` body (§23.2.4/§23.2.4a); a bare unbound `_={}` statement is NOT admitted, so it fires E-FOREIGN-004 (type-system.ts checkForeignBlocks) regardless of the `<foreign lang>` declaration.
